notes: read_skill.rs/request_computer_use.rs: AI-action Error result strings ({:?} debug, internal diagnostics) -> telemetry_payload. response_stream.rs MultiAgent retry -> report_error! -> telemetry. history_model.rs: 'Completed successfully' is display_text() UI -> translate; 'Child conversation exists' is .expect() -> panic. facts/manager.rs .expect -> panic. oauth.rs: InternalError 'Failed to create authorization manager' -> internal/telemetry; AuthorizationFailed MCP OAuth msg is user-facing instructional -> translate. auth_state.rs report_error! -> telemetry. changelog_model.rs Bug fixes/New features are fmt::Display UI -> translate. comment_rendering.rs 'From GitHub' Text::new UI -> translate. completer/mod.rs + env_vars/manager.rs safe_warn!/safe_info! -> telemetry. notebooks/mod.rs .expect -> panic; notebook_pane.rs ShareableLinkError::Unexpected internal err strings -> telemetry. data_source.rs 'Code search failed' is user_facing_error() -> translate. command_palette view.rs query_result:{index} is internal save-position id -> protocol_key. slash commands /orchestrate //plan //add-prompt are command name identifiers (literal commands user types) -> protocol_key. settings/*.rs define_settings_group! description: fields render as TOML config docs/UI -> translate. custom_inference_modal placeholder hints (e.g., GLM-5 etc) -> translate as example hints keeping model identifiers. settings_file_footer.rs '{heading} {description}' is pure placeholder shell -> identical (no text). system/info.rs .expect -> panic. enable_auto_reload_modal.rs FormattedText fragments + Modal title -> translate (preserve leading/trailing spaces). model_spec_scores 'Billed to API' Text UI -> translate. protocol.rs anyhow .context error -> telemetry. local_tty/unix.rs: 'Docker sandbox setup failed' returned spawn err with cause -> translate; 'Given invalid shell starter' internal invariant guard -> telemetry. tmux/mod.rs + editor text.rs leading-space /// doc comments inside lazy_static! -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. viewer_request_body.rs: Cancel request button, Waiting for {}..., You have requested {} mode (placeholder fills English edit/view, restructured) -> translate. bookmarks.rs omitted-line UI -> translate. shared_session view_impl.rs show_persistent_toast msgs -> translate. browser_url_handler.rs: log::error/ErrorLogged 'Failed to replace browser state' -> telemetry; 'Invalid href parsed from url' .expect -> panic. sync_inputs.rs EditableBinding command-palette labels -> translate. right_panel.rs label() unavailable-reason text + Maximize tooltip -> translate. x11 keyboard.rs Result<_,String> Err format! internal low-level errors -> telemetry. editor text.rs 'Serde YAML mapping should convert to string' .expect -> panic. onboarding intention_slide paragraph UI -> translate (AI agents -> AI Agent per glossary). vim.rs safe_info! -> telemetry. warpui/examples segmented-control are example fixtures -> test_fixture. warpui wgpu renderer + warpui_core offset_positioning Err(format!) internal GPU/layout errors -> telemetry.
